home.hero.title: Intelligent Vending Machines, Engineered for Global Operators
home.hero.subtitle: High labour costs. Limited hours. Thin margins. Qtech's factory-direct smart machines sell fresh flowers, hot food and drinks unattended — 24/7, in 80+ countries.

home.advantages.subtitle: A manufacturing partner built for self-service: direct pricing, real engineering, and support in your language.
home.advantages.factoryDirectDesc: Competitive pricing and full quality control from our Guangzhou facility.
home.advantages.selfServiceDesc: Reliable unattended operation built for public and retail spaces.
home.advantages.oemDesc: Branding, configuration and software customization for your market.
home.advantages.globalShippingDesc: Export experience and logistics support to over 60 countries.
